title: Unfiltered match_statistics can double-count the same fixture across overlapping datasets
evidence: KnowledgeGraph.java:111-124 loads BR-Football-Dataset.csv under its own 'tournament' strings and novo_campeonato_brasileiro.csv as 'Brasileirão (histórico 2003-2019)', distinct from 'Brasileirão Série A'; QueryService.averageGoals() (QueryService.java:375) with no competition filter sums goals over all of them, so a Brasileirão match present in multiple datasets is counted more than once.
suggestion: Either de-duplicate matches when aggregating across all competitions, or document that cross-competition stats treat each dataset independently. Per-competition queries (the tested path) are unaffected.

title: Tools.java header references a non-existent ToolsTest
evidence: Tools.java:17 'Used by : McpServer (transport) and ToolsTest (assertions).' — no ToolsTest exists; tool dispatch is actually exercised via McpServerTest.java.
suggestion: Update the context comment to cite McpServerTest, or add a dedicated ToolsTest.

title: QueryService and Tools are large single files
evidence: QueryService.java is 528 lines and Tools.java is 503 lines; maintainability score 0.56 (scores.json) partly reflects this.
suggestion: Optionally split query categories (matches/teams/players/standings/stats) and tool handlers into smaller units; not required by the spec.
